allow: Bash(find . -maxdepth 2 -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "Dockerfile*" -o -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v _bmad | grep -v target | sort)
Bash(pkill -f "ai-patent-assist-backend" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ps aux | grep -v grep | grep patent || echo "No backend process running")
Bash(pkill -9 -f "target/release/ai-patent-assist-backend" 2>/dev/null; fuser -k 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 3000 || echo "Port 3000 is free")
Bash(SERVER_PORT=3002 DATABASE_URL="postgres://patent_user:patent_password@localhost:5432/patent_db" JWT_SECRET="test-secret" timeout 10 cargo run --release 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(SERVER_PORT=3333 DATABASE_URL="postgres://patent_user:patent_password@localhost:5432/patent_db" JWT_SECRET="test-secret" timeout 8 cargo run --release 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(echo "=== 测试专利列表 API ===" && TOKEN="test-admin-token-12345" && curl -s -X GET http://localhost:3000/api/patents -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN")
Bash(echo "=== 测试项目列表 API ===" && TOKEN="test-admin-token-12345" && curl -s -X GET http://localhost:3000/api/projects -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN")
Bash(echo "=== 测试 AI 模型列表 API ===" && TOKEN="test-admin-token-12345" && curl -s -X GET http://localhost:3000/api/ai/models -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN")
